name: Spokeo
notes: Listing-specific opt-out: paste the profile URL, then confirm via email. Re-verify URL each run.

name: Whitepages
notes: Requires the listing URL and a phone callback verification. Phone step is manual.

name: BeenVerified
notes: Search the opt-out tool, select your record, confirm via email link.

name: PeopleFinders
notes: Select your record on the opt-out page, then email confirm.

name: MyLife

template.subject: Data removal / opt-out request — {fullName}

notes: MyLife opt-out is handled by email/phone. Draft is prepared; you send it from your own mailbox.

name: Radaris
notes: Find your profile, request control/removal, confirm via email.

name: TruePeopleSearch
notes: Removal page asks for the record URL + an email confirmation (CAPTCHA likely).

name: FastPeopleSearch
notes: Paste the record URL, confirm via email link (CAPTCHA likely).

name: Instant Checkmate
notes: PeopleConnect brand. Search opt-out tool by name/state, email confirm.

name: TruthFinder
notes: PeopleConnect brand. Search opt-out tool by name/state, email confirm.

name: PeopleConnect

template.subject: Opt-out / suppression across PeopleConnect brands — {fullName}

notes: Umbrella request covering PeopleConnect brands. Send from your own mailbox.

name: Acxiom
notes: Marketing data broker (not people-search) — no public listing to discover. Submit the suppression form directly.

name: Oracle Data Cloud

template.subject: Data opt-out request — {fullName}

notes: Oracle wound down its Advertising/Data Cloud business in 2022; the old datacloudoptout.oracle.com self-service flow may be gone. Email request + re-verify the current channel each run.

name: LexisNexis
notes: Risk-data broker (not people-search). Suppression form requires identity verification; expect a manual ID step.
